whatThisIs: Search the FDA National Drug Code Directory by NDC (10- or 11-digit), proprietary name, non-proprietary name, or active ingredient. The result row carries the labeler, product, package, dosage form, route, marketing category, and FDA application number, drawn directly from the FDA's public NDC release.
whenToUse: Use this when an EOB, pharmacy claim, prior-auth form, or pill bottle references an NDC and you need to know what drug, strength, and package size was actually dispensed or billed. Sophie Well returns the FDA-listed product metadata; it does not check formulary status, pharmacy benefit coverage, or current market availability.
